title: melandrium undulatum
intro: Melandrium undulatum, also known as Alpine Catchfly, is a flowering plant species in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is primarily found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, known for its distinctive white or pink flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Melandrium undulatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing coughs, and aiding in the treatment of bronchitis.
